LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DONALD SOUTHARD MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE; CONSOLIDATION OF ACTIONS; AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND SANCTIONS: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE GRANTED [TO MONTEREY COUNTY]. COSTS TO CHANGE VENUE ALLOWED. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE - GRANTED (#413322 & #413315) [FOR ALL PURPOSES]. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND SANCTIONS DENIED. (SEE ALSO RULING ON CASE #413315 ON DEPT. 301'S CALENDAR, LINE 12.)). (302/JJM/CL) COURT REPORTER ERIC THRONE, CSR#7855

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DONALD SOUTHARD Motion For Change Of Venue; Consolidation Of Actions; and Request For Attorney's Fees and Sanctions:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE GRANTED [to Monterey County]. COSTS TO CHANGE VENUE ALLOWED. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE - GRANTED (#413322 & #413315) [for all purposes]. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND SANCTIONS DENIED. (SEE ALSO RULING ON CASE #413315 ON DEPT. 301'S CALENDAR, LINE 12.)).
